description: PDF Documentation Package Generator - one-click production of complete DS/HD 60364-6 handover documentation using window.open() with formatted HTML and print CSS
steps: Add 'pdf' module to the T.da/T.en/T.fa modules objects (around lines 627, 728, 821) with names like 'Dokumentation'/'Documentation'/'مستندات'
Add 'case pdf: content = renderPDF(); break;' to the renderModule switch statement (around line 2688)
Create pdfState object to hold generation state (selectedTree, generatedAt timestamp)

Create function pdfGeneratePackage(tree) that collects all data needed: installation certificate data, load schedule with phase balancing, cable schedule, protection coordination verdicts, test protocol expected values, and BOM with prices

Create function pdfRenderInstallationCert(tree) returning HTML string for installationsrapport per DS/HD 60364-6 Annex A - includes installation address, installer details, date, description, earthing system, test results summary
Create function pdfRenderLoadSchedule(tree) returning HTML table with phase balancing (L1/L2/L3 kW per circuit, totals, diversity factor, max demand) - uses sldCalcNodeIB for each node
Create function pdfRenderSLD(tree) that wraps the existing sldRenderCanvas(tree) SVG output in a print-friendly container

Create function pdfRenderCableSchedule(tree) returning HTML table with columns: circuit name, cable type (brand+model), mm2, length, Iz, IB, correction factors (install method, temp, grouping), reference clause

Create function pdfRenderProtectionCoordination(tree) that iterates all parent-child pairs calling sldAnalyzeSelectivity() and renders verdicts in a table (upstream device, downstream device, verdict, limit current, clause)

Create function pdfRenderTestProtocol(tree) generating test template with pre-filled expected values: isolation resistance (>1MOhm at 500V DC per DS/HD 60364-6 cl.612.3), loop impedance (Zs from sldCalcNodeZs), RCD trip time (<300ms Type A, <40ms Type B), continuity (expected values from cable resistance)
Create function pdfRenderBOM(tree) using brainGenerateBOM() and priceFor() to generate material specification with wholesaler prices

Create function renderPDF() that shows a UI with: button to generate from current SLD tree (sldState.tree or brainState.generatedTree), preview of each section as collapsible cards, and a 'Print / Save PDF' button that calls pdfPrintPackage()

Create function pdfPrintPackage() that opens a new window with all sections formatted for A4 printing using CSS @media print rules, proper page breaks between sections, headers/footers with page numbers, and calls window.print()
Add comprehensive @media print styles for the PDF output window: A4 page size, section headers, table borders, page break rules, company logo placeholder area
Ensure all text in the PDF package uses tx() for trilingual support - Danish is primary (this is Danish regulatory documentation)
acceptance_criteria: renderPDF() returns valid HTML with no text input fields (click-only UI)
pdfGeneratePackage() produces data for all 7 required sections when given a valid SLD tree
Load schedule includes phase balancing with L1/L2/L3 column totals
Cable schedule has per-circuit data: type, length, Iz, correction factors
Test protocol has pre-filled expected values calculated from the tree (Zs values, >1MOhm insulation)
Protection coordination table shows selectivity verdicts from sldAnalyzeSelectivity()
BOM section shows prices from priceFor() function
All sections cite relevant DS/HD 60364 clauses
Print function uses window.open() with formatted HTML (no external PDF library needed)
All 70 existing tests still pass plus new tests for PDF functions
verification: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('el-dimensionering.html','utf8'); const m=html.match(/<script>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/); if(!m){process.exit(1);} try{new Function(m[1]); console.log('Syntax OK');}catch(e){console.error(e.message); process.exit(1);}"
